keywords: carriage bolts, coach bolts, round head square neck bolts, DIN 603, wood bolts

heading.en: Carriage Bolt Anatomy and Standard Specifications
heading.zh: 马车螺栓结构与标准规格

body.en: Carriage bolts, also known as coach bolts, feature a smooth round head and a square neck beneath the head that prevents rotation when the nut is tightened. This self-locking design makes them ideal for wood-to-metal and wood-to-wood connections where only one side is accessible for tool use. The most common standard is DIN 603, which defines dimensions for round head square neck bolts. Other relevant standards include ISO 8677 and ASME B18.5. Carriage bolts are manufactured in diameters from M5 to M24, with lengths ranging from 20mm to 300mm. The square neck width is slightly larger than the nominal bolt diameter, creating a interference fit in the pre-drilled hole. For B2B buyers sourcing carriage bolts for African and Middle Eastern markets, it is essential to specify the standard, material grade, and surface finish, as these directly affect both performance and pricing.
body.zh: 马车螺栓又称coach螺栓，具有光滑圆头和头部下方的方形颈部，拧紧螺母时防止旋转。这种自锁设计使其非常适合只能从一侧操作的木-金属和木-木连接。最常用标准是DIN 603。其他相关标准包括ISO 8677和ASME B18.5。马车螺栓直径从M5到M24，长度20mm到300mm。方形颈部宽度略大于螺栓公称直径，在预钻孔中形成过盈配合。对于面向非洲和中东市场的B2B买家，必须指定标准、材料等级和表面处理。

body.en: Carriage bolts are available in several material grades, each suited to different applications. Grade 4.6 (low carbon steel) is the most economical option and works well for light-duty wood connections. Grade 8.8 (medium carbon steel, quenched and tempered) offers significantly higher tensile strength and is recommended for structural applications. Grade 10.9 provides the highest strength for heavy-duty structural connections. Stainless steel (A2-70, A4-80) carriage bolts offer excellent corrosion resistance for outdoor and marine applications, making them popular in coastal regions of East Africa and Southeast Asia. Surface finishes include zinc plating (clear or yellow), black oxide, hot-dip galvanizing, and mechanical galvanizing. For bulk procurement, consider that hot-dip galvanized carriage bolts cost 15-25% more than zinc-plated options but provide significantly longer service life in humid or corrosive environments.
body.zh: 马车螺栓有多个材料等级。4.6级（低碳钢）最经济，适合轻载木结构连接。8.8级（中碳钢淬火回火）抗拉强度显著更高，推荐用于结构应用。10.9级提供最高强度。不锈钢（A2-70、A4-80）具有优异耐腐蚀性，适合户外和海洋应用，在东非和东南亚沿海地区很受欢迎。表面处理包括镀锌（白锌/黄锌）、发黑、热浸镀锌和机械镀锌。热浸镀锌比电镀锌贵15-25%，但在潮湿或腐蚀环境中使用寿命显著更长。

body.en: Selecting the correct carriage bolt size requires understanding both the grip length and the thread length. The grip length is the portion of the bolt shank that passes through the connected materials — it should equal the total thickness of the materials being joined. The thread length varies by standard and diameter. For DIN 603, threads are typically 60-70% of the bolt length for shorter bolts and a fixed length for longer bolts. When ordering, specify the nominal diameter, total bolt length, thread pitch (coarse or fine), grade, and finish. For wood applications, the hole should be drilled 1-2mm larger than the bolt diameter to allow for wood movement, while the square neck requires a snug fit to prevent rotation. In hot and humid climates, always use corrosion-resistant finishes or stainless steel. For projects in Zimbabwe and surrounding SADC countries, carriage bolts with SABS or ZABS certification may be required for government-funded construction projects. For more information, also see our guides on [hex bolts](/en/industry/hex-bolt-dimensions-chart), [bolt grades](/en/industry/bolt-grade-markings-guide), [nuts](/en/industry/nylon-nuts-bolts-guide).
body.zh: 选择正确的马车螺栓尺寸需要了解夹持长度和螺纹长度。夹持长度是穿过连接材料的螺栓杆部分，应等于被连接材料的总厚度。DIN 603螺纹长度对较短螺栓为螺栓长度的60-70%。订购时指定公称直径、总长度、螺距、等级和表面处理。木结构应用中，孔径应比螺栓直径大1-2mm，而方形颈部需要紧密配合。炎热潮湿气候下务必使用防腐处理或不锈钢。津巴布韦及周边SADC国家的政府资助项目可能需要SABS或ZABS认证。 欲了解更多，请参阅我们的指南：六角螺栓尺寸表：公制与英制完整尺寸指南及公差, 螺栓等级标记详解：4.6、8.8、10.9与12.9 — 如何识别、选型与指定, 尼龙螺母螺栓指南：性能与应用。

q.en: What is the difference between coarse and fine thread carriage bolts?
q.zh: 粗牙和细牙马车螺栓有什么区别？

a.en: Coarse thread (standard pitch) is more common and easier to install, resists cross-threading, and performs better in wood. Fine thread provides higher clamping force and better vibration resistance but is harder to source in some markets.
a.zh: 粗牙（标准螺距）更常见，安装更容易，抗错扣，在木材中表现更好。细牙提供更高夹紧力和更好的抗振性，但在某些市场较难采购。

q.en: Can carriage bolts be used in steel-to-steel connections?
q.zh: 马车螺栓可用于钢-钢连接吗？

a.en: Generally no. The square neck is designed to embed into wood or similar soft materials to prevent rotation. In steel-to-steel connections, the neck cannot lock, and standard hex bolts or structural bolts should be used instead.
a.zh: 通常不可以。方形颈部设计为嵌入木材或类似软材料以防止旋转。在钢-钢连接中颈部无法锁定，应使用标准六角螺栓或结构螺栓。

q.en: What are Technical Guide and how are they used?

a.en: Technical Guide are essential components in construction and manufacturing. Proper selection depends on load requirements, environmental conditions, and material compatibility.

q.en: How do I choose the right fastener for my project?

a.en: Consider the material being fastened, load requirements, environmental exposure, and applicable standards. Consult with a professional if unsure about specifications.

q.en: What materials are available for these fasteners?

a.en: Common materials include carbon steel, stainless steel, alloy steel, and specialty alloys. Each offers different strength, corrosion resistance, and cost characteristics.
Yes, we offer custom fastener manufacturing to spec. Contact our sales team with your requirements for pricing and lead times.
